policy: Intelligence and recommendation only; no source repository or production environment mutation from this branch.

actions.owner_statement: The deployed job produces repeated errors and should be stopped.
required_before_change: Identify the exact Windows Service name, scheduled task, worker process or deployment unit.
Capture the latest error and execution schedule.
Confirm whether the failing unit is SMS-only or shared with another service.
Record current configuration and rollback/start procedure.
Disable the job or trigger without deleting source code or repository history.
Verify that error generation stops and that no required service is affected.

actions.note: The spoken term 'volumetry' appears more likely to mean vulnerability scanning and/or telemetry/metrics. Exact repository evidence has not yet confirmed a volumetry component.
required_checks: secret scanning without publishing secret values
OpenTelemetry or equivalent traces, metrics and logs where appropriate
repository size, generated assets and binary-content metrics

security: Dependabot or equivalent dependency update policy
secret scanning and push protection where available
manual review gate before automatic dependency fixes on production repositories
observability: OpenTelemetry only where the runtime and deployment model justify it

actions.automation_safety: Do not auto-merge vulnerability fixes across all repositories. Open reviewable changes per repository or family, run builds/tests, and require approval for production systems.
